# Phase-13 — Knowledge Graphs & Vector Systems

> Model knowledge and semantics with graphs, embeddings, and vector search.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 50-51**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Vector Databases: Qdrant and Milvus](01_Vector_Databases_Qdrant_and_Milvus.prompt.md) | `Vector_Databases.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 02 | [Knowledge Graphs with Neo4j](02_Knowledge_Graphs_with_Neo4j.prompt.md) | `Knowledge_Graphs.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 03 | [Embeddings and Semantic Search](03_Embeddings_and_Semantic_Search.prompt.md) | `Embeddings_and_Semantic_Search.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 04 | [GraphRAG](04_GraphRAG.prompt.md) | `GraphRAG.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 05 | [Ontologies and Taxonomies](05_Ontologies_and_Taxonomies.prompt.md) | `Ontologies_and_Taxonomies.md` | 45 min + 2h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
